fresh-blossom.short: Vibrant and fresh, opening with a mixture of bright and pure flowers.
fresh-blossom.full:
Fragrance family: Floral / Fresh. Best for offices, retail spaces, gyms and refreshing commercial interiors.
ScentWorld Fresh Blossom Fragrance Oil is an aromatic masterpiece designed for spaces that need a brighter, more energizing floral profile.
It features a natural floral scent that takes you on a journey to green and vibrant flower fields.
A suitable choice for environments that need a fresher, more active scent direction — creating a light, cheerful and uplifting atmosphere.

gardenia.short: Rich floral gardenia with sweet, intoxicating notes — velvety petals in full bloom.
gardenia.full:
Fragrance family: Floral. Best for spas, hotels, wedding venues and premium retail interiors.
ScentWorld Gardenia Fragrance Oil is a delightful olfactory treasure suited to spaces that need a fuller floral scent with a polished, welcoming atmosphere.
Capturing the essence of blooming gardenia flowers, it combines sweet and captivating aromas that evoke elegance and romance.
It works well in interiors that need a stronger floral presence without losing refinement — the perfect floral diffuser oil for an intoxicating, luxurious ambience.

green-tea.short: Fresh, clean green tea — a calm journey to green tea gardens.
green-tea.full:
Fragrance family: Green / Fresh. Best for spas, wellness centres, clinics and meditation spaces.
ScentWorld Green Tea Fragrance Oil is an aromatic masterpiece intended for spaces that need a lighter scent profile with a calm, restorative feel.
It emits a pure and calming scent that adds a touch of peace, providing relaxation and balance while promoting positive energy.
A great choice for interiors that need a clean scent profile without heaviness, embodying a calm spirit and natural freshness.

lavender.short: Calm, floral lavender recalling green fields filled with delicate blossoms.
lavender.full:
Fragrance family: Floral. Best for bedrooms, spas, wellness centres and quiet workspaces.
ScentWorld Lavender Fragrance Oil is suited to spaces that need a softer, more relaxing scent profile.
This premium lavender diffuser oil embodies calm and comfort, emitting a luxurious scent that helps calm nerves and improve mood for soothing stress relief.
A dependable choice for interiors that benefit from a calmer, more restorative atmosphere — the perfect tranquil escape to help guests unwind.

lemon-grass.short: Fresh citrus-green with lemongrass top notes — pure grass meets bright lemon.
lemon-grass.full:
Fragrance family: Citrus / Green. Best for kitchens, spas, wellness centres and energizing commercial interiors.
ScentWorld Lemon Grass Fragrance Oil is suited to spaces that need a brighter scent with a cleaner green-citrus character.

This uplifting, purifying and energizing blend works well where a fresher, cleaner scent profile is needed throughout the day.

luxury.short: Sophisticated and elegant — luxurious flowers, warm woods and unique spices.
luxury.full:
Fragrance family: Floral Woody / Spicy. Best for luxury hotels, executive offices and premium retail environments.
ScentWorld Luxury Fragrance Oil is an aromatic masterpiece designed for environments that need a more polished scent identity, especially where premium brand presentation matters.
It embodies beauty and elegance in every drop, formulated for high-end delivery without becoming overwhelming.

oud.short: Rich woody oud from agarwood — deep, warm and slightly sweet with smoky, earthy hints.
oud.full:
Fragrance family: Woody. Best for hotels, majlis-style interiors, premium retail and executive spaces.
ScentWorld Oud Fragrance Oil is a luxurious, captivating experience suited to spaces that need a deeper scent profile with stronger, premium character.
Derived from the resinous wood of the agarwood tree, it emits a warm, slightly sweet aroma — rich and complex, with hints of smokiness and earthiness that carry an air of opulence and sophistication.
A strong choice for interiors that need a warmer, more premium scent identity, evoking mystery and allure with an unforgettable ambient presence.

pacivictus.short: Woody notes mixed with mysterious spices like oud and cinnamon.
pacivictus.full:
Fragrance family: Woody / Spicy. Best for executive offices, hotel lobbies and premium business interiors.
ScentWorld Pacivictus Fragrance Oil is built around a rich woody base with deeper spicy notes for a confident commercial scent profile.
These enchanting notes form a powerful, charismatic fragrance that commands attention, reflecting a bold and modern personality.
It fits spaces that need a stronger, character-driven scent identity with warmth, depth and a feeling of strength and distinction.

secret.short: An exciting, bright blend of luxurious florals and ripe fruits.
secret.full:
Fragrance family: Floral / Fruity. Best for boutique hotels, luxury retail and refined commercial interiors.
